Operation 'getProfile' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is minimal and lacks essential details. Improved version clarifies the input parameter (actor identifier), explains what profile data is returned, specifies the AT Protocol terminology (DID, handle), and notes authentication requirements. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the profile information for a specified actor (user) on the Bluesky network. Accepts an actor identifier (DID or handle) as input. Returns the actor's profile data including display name, description, avatar, follower/following counts, and other profile metadata. Does not require authentication for public profiles.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks essential details. Improved version clarifies the input parameter (actor identifier), explains what profile data is returned, specifies the AT Protocol terminology (DID, handle), and notes authentication requirements. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'searchActors' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description provides no actionable information. Enhanced version specifies the search mechanism (query string), documents the two parameters (query and pagination), explains the paginated response structure, and clarifies the use case. This enables AI agents to understand how to construct requests and handle results.

data.summary_suggestion: Search for actors by query and filters
data.description_suggestion: Searches for actors (users) on the Bluesky network matching a query string. Accepts search parameters including query text and pagination controls (limit, cursor). Returns a paginated list of matching actor profiles with their profile information. Useful for discovering users or autocomplete functionality. Does not require authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description provides no actionable information. Enhanced version specifies the search mechanism (query string), documents the two parameters (query and pagination), explains the paginated response structure, and clarifies the use case. This enables AI agents to understand how to construct requests and handle results.

message: Operation 'listNotifications' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. data.current_description: Retrieves a paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user, including likes, reposts, replies, mentions, and follows. Accepts pagination parameters (limit, cursor). Returns notification objects with details about the action, actor, and timestamp. Requires valid AT Protocol JWT authentication. Note: Retrieving notifications may mark them as seen depending on implementation.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated notifications for authenticated user
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. message: Operation 'uploadBlob' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description is severely lacking. Enhanced description clarifies that this is an AT Protocol repository operation, specifies what constitutes valid input (binary file data), explains the response structure (CID and MIME type), documents authentication requirements, and clarifies the side effect (blob association with user repository). This enables AI agents to understand blob handling in the AT Protocol context.

data.description_suggestion: Uploads a binary blob (image, video, or other media file) to the AT Protocol repository. Accepts binary file data in the request body. Returns a blob reference object containing the CID (content identifier) and MIME type, which can be used in subsequent posts or profile updates. Requires AT Protocol JWT authentication. Uploaded blobs are associated with the authenticated user's repository.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is severely lacking. Enhanced description clarifies that this is an AT Protocol repository operation, specifies what constitutes valid input (binary file data), explains the response structure (CID and MIME type), documents authentication requirements, and clarifies the side effect (blob association with user repository). This enables AI agents to understand blob handling in the AT Protocol context.

message: Operation 'createSession' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical details about required inputs (identifier, password), what tokens are returned, how to use them, and session management side effects. AI agents need this information to properly authenticate and maintain sessions.

data.current_summary: Sign in and create an authentication session
data.current_description: Sign in and create an authentication session
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with their credentials (identifier and password) and creates a new AT Protocol session. Returns a JWT access token and refresh token used for subsequent authenticated requests. The access token should be included in the Authorization header for protected endpoints. Side effects: invalidates any previous sessions for the user.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about required inputs (identifier, password), what tokens are returned, how to use them, and session management side effects. AI agents need this information to properly authenticate and maintain sessions.

message: Operation 'refreshSession' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing details about what input is required (refresh token), where it comes from, what is returned, and how to use the new token. AI agents need to understand the refresh token lifecycle and when to call this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Refreshes an expired or expiring AT Protocol session using a valid refresh token. Requires the refresh token from a previous createSession call. Returns a new access token and optionally a new refresh token. Use the new access token for subsequent authenticated requests. Does not invalidate the refresh token unless a new one is issued.
data.reasoning: Missing details about what input is required (refresh token), where it comes from, what is returned, and how to use the new token. AI agents need to understand the refresh token lifecycle and when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'getTimeline' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing information about pagination parameters, response structure, and authentication requirements. AI agents need to understand how to paginate through results and what data is included in the response.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the authenticated user's personalized feed timeline containing posts from followed accounts and recommendations. Supports pagination via limit and cursor parameters. Returns an array of feed posts with metadata (author, timestamps, engagement metrics). Requires valid AT Protocol authentication token.
data.reasoning: Missing information about pagination parameters, response structure, and authentication requirements. AI agents need to understand how to paginate through results and what data is included in the response.

message: Operation 'getAuthorFeed' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. data.current_summary: Get posts by a specific author
data.current_description: Get posts by a specific author
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all posts created by a specific author identified by their DID (Decentralized Identifier) or handle. Supports pagination via limit and cursor parameters. Returns an array of posts with metadata including timestamps, engagement metrics, and reply counts. Does not require authentication but may return different results for authenticated vs. unauthenticated requests.
data.reasoning: Missing details about how to identify the author (DID vs. handle), pagination support, response structure, and authentication behavior. AI agents need this context to construct proper requests.

message: Operation 'getPostThread' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing critical input details (post URI format), response structure (hierarchical thread format), and available parameters for controlling depth. AI agents need to understand how to identify posts and what thread data is returned.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a post and its conversation thread including parent posts (replies-to chain) and child posts (replies). Requires the post URI (Uniform Resource Identifier) as input. Returns a hierarchical thread structure with post metadata, author information, and engagement metrics. Supports depth control via parameters to limit ancestor/descendant retrieval.
data.reasoning: Missing critical input details (post URI format), response structure (hierarchical thread format), and available parameters for controlling depth. AI agents need to understand how to identify posts and what thread data is returned.

message: Operation 'createRecord' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is vague about record types. Description lacks details about collection parameter, required authentication, input structure, return values (URI, CID), and publication side effects. AI agents need to understand how to specify record types and what identifiers are returned.

data.current_summary: Create a record (post, like, follow, etc.)
data.current_description: Create a record (post, like, follow, etc.)
data.summary_suggestion: Create a repository record (post, like, follow)
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new record in the authenticated user's repository. Record type is determined by the collection parameter (e.g., app.bsky.feed.post for posts, app.bsky.feed.like for likes, app.bsky.graph.follow for follows). Requires authentication and the record content as input. Returns the created record with its URI and CID (Content Identifier). Side effects: record is immediately published to the user's repository and visible to other users.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague about record types. Description lacks details about collection parameter, required authentication, input structure, return values (URI, CID), and publication side effects. AI agents need to understand how to specify record types and what identifiers are returned.

message: Operation 'deleteRecord' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing essential details about required inputs (URI, collection), authentication requirement, return value, and critical side effects (permanent deletion, visibility changes). AI agents need this information to safely delete records.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a record from the authenticated user's repository by its URI and collection. Requires authentication and the record's URI (Uniform Resource Identifier) and collection path as input. Returns confirmation of deletion. Side effects: the record is immediately removed from the repository and no longer visible to other users. Deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Missing essential details about required inputs (URI, collection), authentication requirement, return value, and critical side effects (permanent deletion, visibility changes). AI agents need this information to safely delete records.

Returns a paginated list of matching actor profiles with their profile information. Useful for discovering users or autocomplete functionality. Does not require authentication.

message: Operation 'uploadBlob' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description is severely lacking. Enhanced description clarifies that this is an AT Protocol repository operation, specifies what constitutes valid input (binary file data), explains the response structure (CID and MIME type), documents authentication requirements, and clarifies the side effect (blob association with user repository). This enables AI agents to understand blob handling in the AT Protocol context.

data.description_suggestion: Uploads a binary blob (image, video, or other media file) to the AT Protocol repository. Accepts binary file data in the request body. Returns a blob reference object containing the CID (content identifier) and MIME type, which can be used in subsequent posts or profile updates. Requires AT Protocol JWT authentication. Uploaded blobs are associated with the authenticated user's repository.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is severely lacking. Enhanced description clarifies that this is an AT Protocol repository operation, specifies what constitutes valid input (binary file data), explains the response structure (CID and MIME type), documents authentication requirements, and clarifies the side effect (blob association with user repository). This enables AI agents to understand blob handling in the AT Protocol context.

message: Operation 'createSession' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical details about required inputs (identifier, password), what tokens are returned, and how they should be used. AI agents need to understand that this operation produces the bearerAuth tokens required by other operations.

data.current_summary: Sign in and create an authentication session
data.current_description: Sign in and create an authentication session
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with their credentials (identifier and password) and creates a new AT Protocol session. Returns a JWT access token and refresh token for subsequent authenticated requests. The access token is required for operations marked with bearerAuth security. Side effects: invalidates any previous sessions for the user.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about required inputs (identifier, password), what tokens are returned, and how they should be used. AI agents need to understand that this operation produces the bearerAuth tokens required by other operations.

message: Operation 'refreshSession' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing context about when to use this operation (token expiration), what input is required (refresh token), and what output is provided (new access token). AI agents need to understand the relationship between this operation and createSession.

data.description_suggestion: Refreshes an expired or expiring AT Protocol session using a valid refresh token. Returns a new JWT access token for continued authenticated access. Requires the refresh token from a previous createSession call. Use this operation when the current access token approaches expiration to maintain uninterrupted API access.
data.reasoning: Missing context about when to use this operation (token expiration), what input is required (refresh token), and what output is provided (new access token). AI agents need to understand the relationship between this operation and createSession.

message: Operation 'createRecord' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too generic. AI agents need to understand the different record types supported, required input structure (collection, content), what is returned (URI, CID), and that this operation has public visibility side effects.

data.current_summary: Create a record (post, like, follow, etc.)
data.current_description: Create a record (post, like, follow, etc.)
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new record in the authenticated user's repository. Supports multiple record types including posts (app.bsky.feed.post), likes (app.bsky.feed.like), and follows (app.bsky.graph.follow). Requires specifying the record type (collection), content data, and optional creation timestamp. Returns the created record with its URI and CID (Content Identifier). Side effects: record is immediately published to the user's repository and visible to other users based on record type.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic. AI agents need to understand the different record types supported, required input structure (collection, content), what is returned (URI, CID), and that this operation has public visibility side effects.

message: Operation 'deleteRecord' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing essential input details (URI, CID required), output confirmation details, and critical side effects (permanent deletion, visibility changes). AI agents need to understand the irreversible nature of this operation and what identifiers are required.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a record from the authenticated user's repository by its URI and CID (Content Identifier). Supports deletion of any record type (posts, likes, follows, etc.). Requires the record's URI and CID as inputs. Returns confirmation of deletion. Side effects: deleted record is removed from the user's repository and no longer visible to other users; deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Missing essential input details (URI, CID required), output confirmation details, and critical side effects (permanent deletion, visibility changes). AI agents need to understand the irreversible nature of this operation and what identifiers are required.
